changeSet.author: elielson.silva
elielson.silva
elielson.silva
elielson.silva
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Civic', 'Accord', 'Fit', 'City' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'HONDA') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'CARRO') t;
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'HR-V', 'CR-V' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'HONDA') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'SUV') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
elielson.silva
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Renegade', 'Compass', 'Cherokee', 'Commander' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'JEEP') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'SUV') t;
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Gladiator' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'JEEP') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'CAMINHONETE') t;

elielson.silva
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ '206', '207', '208', '306', '307', '308', '408', '508' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'PEUGEOT') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'CARRO') t;

elielson.silva
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Série 1', 'Série 2', 'Série 3', 'Série 4', 'Série 5', 'Série 6', 'Série 7', 'Série 8', 'M2', 'M3', 'M4', 'M5', 'M8', 'i4', 'i7', 'Z3', 'Z4' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'BMW') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'CARRO') t;
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'iX', 'X1', 'X2', 'X3', 'X4', 'X5', 'X6', 'X7' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'BMW') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'SUV') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'A 200', 'A 250', 'A 35', 'A 45', 'C 180', 'C 200', 'C 300', 'C 43', 'C 63', 'E 350', 'E 450', 'E 53', 'E 63', 'E 73', 'E-Class', 'S 500', 'S 580', 'S 600', 'S 680', 'S 63', 'S 73', 'CLA 180', 'CLA 200', 'CLA 250', 'CLA 35', 'CLA 45', 'CLS 350', 'CLS 400', 'CLS 450', 'CLS 500', 'CLS 550', 'CLS 53', 'CLS 63' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) LIKE 'MERCEDES%') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'CARRO') t;
INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'GLA 200', 'GLA 250', 'GLA 35', 'GLA 45', 'GLB 200', 'GLB 250', 'GLB 35', 'GLC 200', 'GLC 250', 'GLC 300', 'GLC 350e', 'GLC 43', 'GLC 63', 'GLE 250', 'GLE 300', 'GLE 350', 'GLE 400', 'GLE 450', 'GLE 500', 'GLE 53', 'GLE 63', 'GLS 350', 'GLS 400', 'GLS 450', 'GLS 500', 'GLS 580', 'GLS 600', 'GLS 63', 'EQA', 'EQB', 'EQC' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) LIKE 'MERCEDES%') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'SUV') t;

changeSet.sql:

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'CG 125', 'CG 150', 'CG 160', 'Biz', 'Pop 100', 'XRE 190', 'XRE 300', 'CB 250 Twister', 'CB 300F Twister', 'CB 500X', 'CB 500F', 'CB 600F Hornet', 'CB 650R', 'CB 1000R', 'NC 750X', 'CRF 230F', 'CRF 250F', 'CRF 1100L Africa Twin', 'CBR 250R', 'CBR 500R', 'CBR 600RR', 'CBR 1000RR Fireblade', 'NXR 125 Bros', 'NXR 150 Bros', 'NXR 160 Bros', 'PCX 150', 'CB 500 Hornet' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'HONDA') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'G 310', 'F 750', 'F 850', 'F 900', 'R 1250', 'S 1000' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'BMW') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'YZF-R1', 'YZF-R6', 'YZF-R3', 'MT-10', 'MT-09', 'MT-07', 'MT-03', 'FZ25', 'Fazer 250', 'Fazer 150', 'Factor 150', 'Factor 125', 'XJ6 N', 'XT 660R', 'XT 660Z Ténéré', 'Ténéré 700', 'Lander 250', 'Crosser 150', 'NMax 160', 'Neo 125', 'Crypton 125', 'XTZ 125', 'XTZ 250', 'WR 450F', 'YZ 250F', 'YZ 450F' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'YAMAHA') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Ninja 300', 'Ninja 400', 'Ninja 500', 'Ninja 650', 'Ninja ZX-4R', 'Ninja ZX-6R', 'Ninja ZX-10R', 'Ninja ZX-14R', 'Z300', 'Z400', 'Z500', 'Z650', 'Z900', 'Z1000', 'Z H2', 'Versys 300', 'Versys 650', 'Versys 1000', 'Vulcan S', 'Vulcan 900 Custom', 'Vulcan 1700 Vaquero', 'KX 250', 'KX 450', 'KLX 230', 'KLX 300R' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'KAWASAKI') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Apache RTR 200', 'Apache RTR 160', 'Citycom 300i', 'Cruiser 150', 'Horizon 150', 'Horizon 250', 'Kansas 150', 'Next 250', 'Next 300', 'Maxsym 400i', 'Smart 125', 'Speed 150', 'Super 50', 'Zig 50', 'Zig 100', 'VS 150' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'DAFRA') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Sportster Iron 883', 'Sportster Forty-Eight', 'Sportster Nightster', 'Sportster Roadster', 'Softail Standard', 'Softail Fat Bob', 'Softail Fat Boy', 'Softail Street Bob', 'Softail Heritage Classic', 'Softail Low Rider S', 'Softail Breakout', 'Softail Deluxe', 'Softail Rocker C', 'Softail Springer', 'Touring Road King', 'Touring Street Glide', 'Touring Road Glide', 'Touring Electra Glide', 'Touring Ultra Limited', 'CVO Street Glide', 'CVO Road Glide', 'CVO Ultra Limited', 'Pan America 1250', 'Pan America 1250 Special', 'LiveWire', 'V-Rod', 'Night Rod', 'Dyna Super Glide', 'Dyna Fat Bob', 'Dyna Wide Glide', 'Dyna Street Bob' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) LIKE 'HARLEY%') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Bonneville T100', 'Bonneville T120', 'Bonneville Bobber', 'Bonneville Speedmaster', 'Street Twin', 'Speed Twin', 'Thruxton RS', 'Scrambler 900', 'Scrambler 1200 XC', 'Scrambler 1200 XE', 'Tiger 660 Sport', 'Tiger 850 Sport', 'Tiger 900 GT', 'Tiger 900 Rally', 'Tiger 900 Rally Pro', 'Tiger 1200 GT Pro', 'Tiger 1200 Rally Pro', 'Tiger 1200 Rally Explorer', 'Tiger 1200 GT Explorer', 'Speed Triple 1200 RS', 'Speed Triple 1200 RR', 'Street Triple 765 R', 'Street Triple 765 RS', 'Daytona Moto2 765', 'Rocket 3 R', 'Rocket 3 GT' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'TRIUMPH') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ 'Monster 797', 'Monster 821', 'Monster SP', 'Diavel 1260', 'Diavel V4', 'XDiavel', 'Streetfighter V2', 'Streetfighter V4', 'Streetfighter V4 SP', 'SuperSport 950', 'SuperSport 950 S', 'Hypermotard 950', 'Hypermotard 950 SP', 'Panigale V2', 'Panigale V4', 'Panigale V4 S', 'Panigale V4 R', 'Multistrada V2', 'Multistrada V2 S', 'Multistrada V4', 'Multistrada V4 S', 'Multistrada V4 Rally', 'Multistrada V4 Pikes Peak', 'DesertX', 'Scrambler Icon', 'Scrambler Nightshift', 'Scrambler Full Throttle', 'Scrambler 1100 Sport Pro' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'DUCATI') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO modelo_veiculo (nome, id_marca, id_tipo) SELECT nome, m.id, t.id FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[ '200 Duke', '250 Duke', '390 Duke', '790 Duke', '890 Duke R', '1290 Super Duke R', 'RC 200', 'RC 390', '250 Adventure', '390 Adventure', '790 Adventure', '890 Adventure', '1290 Super Adventure R', '1290 Super Adventure S', 'EXC 250 TPI', 'EXC 300 TPI', 'EXC 350 F', 'EXC 450 F', 'EXC 500 F', '450 SX-F', '250 SX-F' ]) AS nome CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM marca_veiculo WHERE UPPER(nome) = 'KTM') m CROSS JOIN (SELECT id FROM tipo_veiculo WHERE UPPER(descricao) = 'MOTO') t;

changeSet.author: elielson.silva
